decisions.note: Source text lists Profile 20-400 as a complete part (quantity 1), not to be cut. No cutting operation appears in the source.
Source text lists Profile 20-150 as a complete part (quantity 4), not to be cut. No cutting operation appears in the source.
Source says 'Attach brackets first to the vertical profiles, then to the top and bottom' as a remark/instruction, not a mandatory constraint. Enforcement should be 'should', not 'must'.
Source states 'The final tightening of the screws should be all together at the end' as a directive in the remarks section. This is a postcondition that must occur, not merely should occur.
orphaned: parent step S1 rejected (Profile 20-400 is a complete part, not a cut step)
